evals.prompt: Write the article from the 'how to make pour-over coffee' brief for driftroast.
evals.expected_output: A draft with valid front-matter that passes validate_draft.py (0 high violations): definition-first, question H2s answered, no naked stats, no brand claim outside locked-facts.

assertions.text: front-matter locked_facts_used and sources reflect the body
assertions.name: frontmatter_accurate

assertions.text: any external stat has a citation
assertions.name: stats_cited
